texto: We all have a responsibility, and since I've been so wonderfully blessed, I really want to share and to make life at least a little better. So every chance I get to share the gospel or uplift people, I will take full advantage of that opportunity.
explicacao: Citação de Gladys Knight sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “We all have a responsibility, and since I've been so wonderfully blessed, I really want to share …” articula vida, responsibility, share em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como responsibility.
